debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
h_not_same : u ≠ v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor_cfd : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
rightSide : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z }) := (↑dstep.prod).rhs
allChildren : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_2 α nt G u v cfd u' dstep sound
    (fun derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }))
    derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd (fun h_same h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor => [])
    fun u'' dstep' derivation' sound' h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor =>
    have u'_comp := ⋯;
    have derivation_exhaustive :=
      ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustive_imp_child_exhaustive α nt G u v cfd h_exhaustive u' dstep
        derivation sound ⋯;
    collectDerivationTreeNodes derivation derivation_exhaustive ⋯
u_comp✝ : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
var_len_1 : (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len = 1
pre_len_less_u_len : dstep.pre.len < u.len
u_comp : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
suf_len_less_u_len : dstep.suf.len < u.len
leftOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.pre.len, ⋯⟩
rightOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.suf.len, ⋯⟩
rhs_symbol_count : ℕ := (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
u'_eq_result : dstep.result = u'
n : ℕ
h_num_vars_rhs : (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len = n + 1
h_rhs_non_empty : 1 ≤ (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
h_u_vs_u'_len : u'.len = u.len + (rhs_symbol_count - 1)
h_u_vs_u'_len₂ : u.len ≤ u'.len
u_range_subset_u'_range : Finset.range u.len ⊆ Finset.range u'.len
leftOfVarCount₂ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } := ⟨↑leftOfVarCount, ⋯⟩
index₁ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
h_index_valid : ∃ location ∈ allChildren, location.2 = index₁
afunc : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) →
  G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } → List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
afuncDef :
  afunc = fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
a : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
aDef : a = List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
head₁ : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail₁ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
head₂ : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail₂ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
h_head_tail_neq_nil : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ []
h_pos₂ : tail₂ ≠ []
h_pos₁ : tail₁ ≠ []
ind_hyp₂ : ¬List.foldl afunc tail₁ tail₂ = [] → ¬List.foldl afunc (head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ = []
ind_hyp₁ : ¬List.foldl afunc (afunc tail₁ head₂) tail₂ = []
h_neg_head₂ : ¬index₁ = head₂.2
⊢ ¬List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev)
        (if index₁ = head₂.2 then head₁ :: (tail₁ ++ [head₂]) else head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ =
      []

proof:
simp [h_neg_head₂, afuncDef] at *
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁
failed_attempts:
have h_f : ∀ acc, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) acc tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons _ _ ih => intro acc ha; simp; apply ih; split <;> simp [ha]
                      simp [h_neg_head₂]; exact h_f (head₁ :: tail₁) (by simp)

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁
                      case nil => simp
                      case cons h t ih =>
                        simp; split <;> apply ih

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁
                      case nil => simp
                      case cons h t ih =>
                        simp [List.foldl_cons]
                        split <;> apply ih

have h_afunc : ∀ p x, afunc p x = if index₁ = x.2 then p ++ [x] else p := by
                        intros; rw [afuncDef]; cases x; rfl
                      simp [h_neg_head₂, h_afunc] at *
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

intro h
                      have f : ∀ l i, i ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun p x => if index₁ = x.2 then p ++ [x] else p) i l ≠ [] := by
                        intro l; induction l with | nil => simp | cons _ _ ih => intros; apply ih; split_ifs <;> simp [*]
                      exact f tail₂ _ (by simp [h_neg_head₂]) h

induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁
                      case nil =>
                        simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      case cons x xs ih =>
                        simp [List.foldl_cons, h_neg_head₂] at *
                        split_ifs <;> apply ih

rw [if_neg h_neg_head₂]
                      induction tail₂ generalizing tail₁ with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons x xs ih => simp [List.foldl, List.cons_append]; split_ifs <;> apply ih

intro h_foldl
                      have h_all : ∀ L, L ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) L tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ with
                        | nil => intro L hL; exact hL
                        | cons x t ih =>
                          intro L hL; simp; apply ih
                          split <;> (cases L; contradiction; simp)
                      exact h_all _ (by split <;> simp) h_foldl

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁
                      case nil => simp
                      case cons head_next tail_next ih =>
                        simp; split <;> apply ih

have h_f : ∀ a, a ≠ [] → List.foldl (fun p x => if index₁ = x.2 then p ++ [x] else p) a tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ generalizing a with | nil => intros; simp | cons _ _ ih => intros; simp; split <;> (apply ih; simp [*])
                      apply h_f; split <;> simp
simp [h_neg_head₂, h_head_tail_neq_nil]; induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁ <;> (simp [*]; split <;> apply ih)

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁
                      case nil => simp
                      case cons h t ih =>
                        simp [List.foldl_cons]; split <;> apply ih

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      have h_ne : ∀ {acc}, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        intro acc h_acc; induction tail₂ generalizing acc
                        case nil => exact h_acc
                        case cons h t ih =>
                          simp [afuncDef]; split
                          case isTrue => apply ih; cases acc <;> simp
                          case isFalse => apply ih h_acc
                      apply h_ne h_head_tail_neq_nil

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁ with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons head₃ tail₃ ih =>
                        simp [List.foldl]
                        split <;> apply ih

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁
                      . simp
                      . simp; split <;> apply ih

simp [h_neg_head₂, ← afuncDef]
                      apply ind_hyp₂
                      simpa [h_neg_head₂] using ind_hyp₁

simp [h_neg_head₂]
                      induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁
                      case nil => simp
                      case cons h t ih =>
                        simp [List.foldl]; split_ifs <;> apply ih
successful_attempts:
simp [h_neg_head₂, afuncDef] at *
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp [afuncDef, h_neg_head₂] at *
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁
simp [h_neg_head₂, afuncDef] at *; exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp [h_neg_head₂, afuncDef] at *
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp [h_neg_head₂, afuncDef] at *
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁
simp [afuncDef, h_neg_head₂] at *; exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp [h_neg_head₂, ← afuncDef]
                      apply ind_hyp₂
                      simp [afuncDef, h_neg_head₂] at ind_hyp₁
                      exact ind_hyp₁

simp [h_neg_head₂, afunc, afuncDef] at *
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁
simp [h_neg_head₂, afuncDef] at *; exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp [h_neg_head₂, afuncDef] at *
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp [afuncDef, h_neg_head₂] at *
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp [h_neg_head₂, afuncDef] at *
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁
simp [afuncDef, h_neg_head₂] at *; exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁
simp [afuncDef, h_neg_head₂] at *; exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁

simp [h_neg_head₂, afuncDef] at *
                      exact ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁
